task_completion.description: Create a new tax return for Marcus Thibodeau in StudioTax.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax application window is open with the taxpayer's name 'Marcus Thibodeau' visible in the personal information section, identification form, or the active return tab.
A T4 data entry screen in StudioTax is visible with the employment income box (Box 14) showing exactly $68,200.

task_completion.description: Claim the eligible dependant and child care expenses.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Child care expenses form (T778) showing $8,400 AND/OR Schedule 5 / Line 30400 showing an eligible dependant claim for a separated parent.

task_completion.description: Enter the Manitoba rent credit information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Manitoba provincial forms (MB479/MB428) are visible showing rent paid of $16,800.

task_completion.description: Complete the TL2 Claim for Meals and Lodging at the long-haul rate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: TL2 form is visible showing a calculated deduction of $9,825.60 (or rounded to $9,826), indicating the 80% long-haul rate was applied to the total meal expenses.

task_completion.description: Save the completed return to the specified directory with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box showing the file name 'marcus_thibodeau.24t' and the path 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\' OR the StudioTax title bar showing this exact filename.

integrity.description: Agent used the StudioTax GUI to enter data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual StudioTax 2024 graphical user interface being used to input data, rather than a text editor modifying the .24t file directly.

integrity.description: Agent navigated through the appropriate tax forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent opening specific tax slips and forms (e.g., T4, TL2, MB479) to enter data rather than just overriding final summary lines on the T1 General.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass GUI saving.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows (Command Prompt, PowerShell) are used to directly generate, copy, or move the .24t file to the destination folder.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Taxpayer: Marcus Thibodeau (Separated, Province: MB). Expected T4 employment income: $68,200. Expected TL2 (Meals and Lodging) deduction: $9,825.60 (or $9,826) calculated at the 80% long-haul rate. Child care expenses: $8,400. Eligible dependant claim on Line 30400. Manitoba rent credit (MB428/MB479) based on $16,800 rent paid. Output file must be exactly 'marcus_thibodeau.24t' saved in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\'.
